core_mechanism: a constraint-gated Markov jump process (master-equation dynamics) on a configuration space in which each transition is permitted only when a local neighbourhood condition is met, leaving the stationary distribution trivial/unchanged while producing anomalously slow relaxation and a purely dynamical (non-static) transition
brief_reason: The abstract states the models have trivial equilibrium behaviour yet slow dynamics arising solely from restrictions on the allowed transitions between configurations, i.e. a stochastic dynamics whose kinetics are locally constrained without any change to the equilibrium measure.
